variants: Firdaus Melokyan was born in Indigo Vale, where she developed a passion for community engagement from an early age. She serves on the Kindling Arts Guild Council, fostering local artistic initiatives. A graduate of Fireglass College, Firdaus has honed her skills in professional Haitian Creole text. Currently, she is employed at Twillow Path Computing, where she applies her expertise in technology and software development. Her diverse experiences reflect her commitment to both her professional and civic responsibilities.
